name: CMAPSS_FD001
comment: Aerospace domain — turbofan engine degradation (single operating condition, single fault mode). 100 train + 100 test engines.

name: PHM2012_PRONOSTIA_Bearings
comment: Mechanical domain — accelerated bearing degradation under controlled conditions. 12 vibration features extracted per snapshot.

name: NASA_Battery_Capacity
comment: Electrochemical domain — Li-ion battery capacity fade. RUL = cycles until capacity drops below 70% of initial.

name: Weather_Dynamics
comment: Meteorological domain — synthetic weather station data with diurnal and seasonal temperature/pressure/humidity/wind cycles. Target: predict future temperature 24h ahead. Tests Koopman discovery of quasi-periodic dynamics.

name: Finance_Market_Dynamics
comment: Financial domain — synthetic mean-reverting GBM with regime switching. Target: time-to-drawdown (RUL analog) or future return. Tests Koopman recovery of stochastic dynamics with latent regimes.

name: Synthetic_ODE_Validation
comment: Validation domain — known linear ODE system with analytical eigenvalues. Tests whether KePIN correctly recovers the true Koopman operator from noisy nonlinear observables. Ground-truth eigenvalues of A: -0.04 ± 0.0917i.
